hooks.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: prefer mcp__fff__grep / mcp__fff__multi_grep over shell grep in this git-indexed directory (see CLAUDE.md)."}}' || true

git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: prefer mcp__fff__find_files over shell find in this git-indexed directory (see CLAUDE.md)."}}' || true

git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: prefer mcp__fff__grep / mcp__fff__multi_grep over Grep in this git-indexed directory (see CLAUDE.md)."}}' || true

git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: prefer mcp__fff__find_files over Glob in this git-indexed directory (see CLAUDE.md)."}}' || true

statusLine.command: bash -c 'cols=$(stty size </dev/tty 2>/dev/null | awk '"'"'{print $2}'"'"'); export COLUMNS=$(( ${cols:-120} > 4 ? ${cols:-120} - 4 : 1 )); plugin_dir=$(ls -d "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"/plugins/cache/*/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | sed '"'"'s|//*$|/|'"'"' | awk -F/ '"'"'{ print $(NF-1) "\t" $(0) }'"'"' | grep -E '"'"'^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+[[:space:]]'"'"' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n -k4,4n | tail -1 | cut -f2-); exec "/opt/homebrew/bin/bun" --env-file /dev/null "${plugin_dir}src/index.ts"'
